title: Dynamite Mod
description: Adds throwable dynamite sticks that blow up without destroying blocks.
body:
[![Requires Fabric API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) This mod adds **Dynamite** to the game. You can craft it using **String**, **Gunpowder** and **Paper**. Very useful for dealing large amounts of ranged damage without destroying blocks.

Crafting Recipe
